working_on: Phase 2 (Build Plan Scaffolding) — author build_plan/ tree (MANIFEST, preamble, session schedule, P_0 retroactive contract lock, per-phase chunks for Phases 3–9) against partition-aware paths per ADR 0037; bundle the HANDOFF reserved CHANGELOG.md stub at boot.
outcome_summary: Phase 2 closed: build_plan/ tree authored (14 files — MANIFEST, 00_preamble, 00_session_schedule, P_0 retroactive, M_partition_migration bridge, P_1–P_9 per-phase chunks for Phases 3/4/4.5/5/DEC.1/6/7/8/9). Chunking decision: Phase 5 collapsed to one P_4 master chunk with subdomain sub-sessions enumerated inside; ROADMAP Phase 5 internal P_3-P_9 naming repurposed as sub-session enumeration within P_4 to avoid the build_plan/P_N collision. Chunks reference partition-aware paths per ADR 0037 (engine/STATE.md, engine/operations/, engine/tools/, product/docs/, product/AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md, product/CHANGELOG.md, product/seed-graph/migrations/) so the M_partition_migration session needs zero edits to them. ADR cross-references in chunks remain at root paths because per-ADR engine/product partition is settled at S-0024, not presupposed by chunks. Bundled HANDOFF item: CHANGELOG.md reserved-stub created at root; ENGINE_LOG.md preamble light-revised to point at the stub instead of 'absence is the signal'. STATE.md next-session work item updated to S-0024 = M_partition_migration. ENGINE_LOG entry under [Unreleased] added. validate.py: 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns. Estimated context budget consumed within target tier; no partial-closure needed.
